scripts.build: pnpm --filter core build && pnpm --filter plugin-* run build
scripts.build:win: pnpm build && pnpm --filter core exec -- electron-builder --win
scripts.build:mac: pnpm build && pnpm --filter core exec -- electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:linux: pnpm build && pnpm --filter core exec -- electron-builder --linux
scripts.build:unpack: pnpm build && pnpm --filter core exec -- electron-builder --dir
